title: Japanese destroyer Kuwa
summary:
Two Japanese destroyers have been named Kuwa (桑; ”morus”):

Japanese destroyer Kuwa (1918), an Enoki-class destroyer of the Imperial Japanese Navy launched in 1918 and sold in 1932
Japanese destroyer Kuwa (1944), a Matsu-class destroyer of the Imperial Japanese Navy launched in May 1944 and sunk in December 1944
